name: Chicken Marengo
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb boneless chicken breasts, cut into large pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour, salt, pepper, and dried tarragon in a shallow dish.
2. Dredge the chicken pieces in the seasoned flour mixture, shaking off any excess.
3. Reserve the remaining flour mixture for later use.
4. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil and butter over medium heat.
5. Add the dredged chicken to the skillet and brown on all sides, turning occasionally until golden brown. Remove the chicken to a heavy casserole dish.
6. In the same skillet, add the remaining flour mixture and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until lightly golden.
7. Gradually stir in the white wine using a wire whisk, cooking until the sauce thickens and becomes smooth.
8. Pour the sauce over the chicken in the casserole dish, followed by the canned tomatoes, garlic, and mushrooms.
9. Cover the dish with foil and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or less, stirring occasionally.
10. Serve hot over rice. Serves 4.
